name: Integra Credit
description_short: Integra Credit is a Chicago-based online subprime lender. BBB A+ accredited since 2018. Loans $500-$3,000 with APRs of 149-399%. Fast online approval. Last-resort lending for very poor credit.
description_long:
Integra Credit is an online subprime lender headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, founded in 2014. The company offers installment loans ranging from $500 to $3,000 with loan terms of 10-21 months, primarily serving borrowers with very poor credit who cannot access traditional lending. Integra holds BBB A+ accreditation since 2018 and approximately 2,237 Google reviews. APRs range from 149% to 399% — among the highest in consumer lending.

The company offers a fully online application with fast approval and funding. Products include installment loans, personal loans, quick loans, and lines of credit. The streamlined process appeals to borrowers who need funds quickly and have been rejected by mainstream lenders.

At 149-399% APR, Integra Credit is an extremely expensive lending option. A $2,000 loan at 300% APR costs dramatically more than the same amount from a credit union (typically 7-18% APR). The BBB A+ accreditation and mixed reviews (positive on speed, negative on costs) reflect the tension between accessibility and affordability in subprime lending.

As a consumer lender, this company competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

tiers.name: Line of Credit
features: Draw funds as needed up to credit limit

pros: Explicitly serves borrowers with bad credit and claims to evaluate beyond credit scores
Offers multiple loan products including installment loans, bad credit loans, quick loans, and lines of credit
Promises virtually instant lending decisions on completed applications
Emphasizes funding as early as the next business day
Fast, streamlined four-step online application process requiring no in-person visit
Allows borrowers to select their desired loan amount
cons: Website does not disclose APR ranges, interest rates, or fee structure
No specific loan amounts or terms are listed (only vague references to flexibility)
Eligibility requirements are not clearly stated on the website
No information about credit score minimums or specific criteria for bad credit approval
Website contains no third-party reviews, testimonials, or financial disclosures to verify claims
best_for: Borrowers with very poor credit who cannot access any other lending options
Consumers needing $500-$3,000 with fast online approval and funding
Individuals who understand the high APR cost and accept it as a last-resort option
diagnosis: Integra Credit provides fast access to small loans for borrowers with very poor credit, but at extreme cost (149-399% APR). The BBB A+ accreditation is a trust signal, but it does not change the fundamental economics. Use only as an absolute last resort after exhausting: credit union loans, employer advances, nonprofit emergency assistance, family loans, and credit card cash advances. The high APR can trap borrowers in cycles of expensive debt.
services: Bad credit loans for borrowers with poor credit history
Installment loans with customizable payment terms
Quick loans with virtually instant approval decisions
Lines of credit as an alternative to traditional loans
Fast funding directly to bank accounts
Loan agreement review and signing online
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 200 W Jackson Blvd Suite 500, Chicago, IL 60606
